ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in days */,
  "certification" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the program leads to certification */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the program ends */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Cost of the program */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants the program can accommodate */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Required prerequisites for the program */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead instructor for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program session */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the program session */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the program session is held */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the program session is held */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Registration status for the program session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location_details" TEXT /* Detailed location information (e.g., address, venue) */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the session */,
  "current_participants" INTEGER /* Current number of participants registered for the session */,
  "early_bird_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for early bird registration */,
  "late_registration_fee" TEXT /* Additional fee for late registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_sessions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Participant's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Participant's gender */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the participant has */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Any dietary restrictions the participant has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the participant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the participant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status for the registration */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., early bird, regular, late) */,
  "registration_fee_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid for registration */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "cancellation_status" TEXT /* Status of registration cancellation (e.g., not canceled, canceled) */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the registration was canceled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES program_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was certified */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Unique certification number */,
  "certification_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the certification */,
  "recertification_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if recertification is required */,
  "recertification_date" TEXT /* Date the participant needs to recertify */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the certification was issued */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the certification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, trainer, participant) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's information was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES program_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
